queries.question: Display all the cruise ships but only the resorts that offer a dance class.
queries.sql:
SELECT Cruise_Ship.name
FROM Cruise_Ship
UNION
SELECT All_Inclusive_Resort.name
FROM All_Inclusive_Resort
WHERE All_Inclusive_Resort.activities = "Dance Class"

queries.question: Show cruise ships and resorts that offer a dance class.
queries.sql:
SELECT Cruise_Ship.name
FROM Cruise_Ship
WHERE Cruise_Ship.activities = "Dance Class"
UNION
SELECT All_Inclusive_Resort.name
FROM All_Inclusive_Resort
WHERE All_Inclusive_Resort.activities = "Dance Class"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show cruise ships and resorts that offer a dance class.
